name: wingman
description: Cross-platform AI coding plugin for project memory, contract checks, and project-map discovery.

interface.shortDescription: Project memory, contract checks, and project-map discovery for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Wingman gives agents reusable skills for loading project memory, aligning API/type contracts, finding existing project capabilities, and cataloging durable capability knowledge.
defaultPrompt: Use Wingman to load project context before this change.
Use data-contracts to align this API response with the existing UI types before editing.
Use Wingman to find existing project capabilities before rebuilding them.
